title: DotMotif: an open-source tool for connectome subgraph isomorphism search and graph queries
abstract: DotMotif is an intuitive graph query tool that abstracts subgraph-isomorphism search for connectome analysis. It exposes a neuroscience-friendly syntax for rapidly constructing queries to find circuit motifs in large-scale connectomes, interfacing with NetworkX or Neo4j backends.
notes: Matelsky first author. Key tool for circuit motif discovery in connectomes. JHU APL.
